description:
PostgreSQL is a powerful, open source object-relational database system with over 35 years of active development that has earned it a strong reputation for reliability, feature robustness, and performance.

PostgreSQL is a highly stable database backed by more than 20 years of development by the open-source community.

PostgreSQL is used as a primary database for many web applications as well as mobile and analytics applications.
tagline: PostgreSQL is an advanced, enterprise-class, and open-source relational database system. PostgreSQL supports both SQL (relational) and JSON (non-relational) querying.
author: WisdomSky

tips.before_install:
Default user: `casaos`
Default password: `casaos`
Default database: `casaos`

releaseNotes.en_US:
- PostgreSQL 17.4 fixes libpq quoting behavior after CVE-2025-1094 so length-limited strings are handled correctly.
- The release also fixes a pg_createsubscriber memory leak and a Meson build-system header detection issue.
releaseNotes.en_GB:
- PostgreSQL 17.4 fixes libpq quoting behavior after CVE-2025-1094 so length-limited strings are handled correctly.
- The release also fixes a pg_createsubscriber memory leak and a Meson build-system header detection issue.
releaseNotes.it_IT:
- PostgreSQL 17.4 risolve il comportamento delle virgolette di libpq dopo CVE-2025-1094 in modo che le stringhe length-limited vengano gestite correttamente.
- La versione risolve anche una perdita di memoria di pg_createsubscriber e un problema di rilevamento dell'intestazione Meson build-system.
releaseNotes.nb_NO:
- PostgreSQL 17.4 fikser libpq sitatoppførsel etter CVE-2025-1094 slik at length-limited strenger håndteres riktig.
- Utgivelsen fikser også en pg_createsubscriber-minnelekkasje og et Meson build-system-headerdeteksjonsproblem.
releaseNotes.zh_CN:
- PostgreSQL 17.4 修复了 CVE-2025-1094 之后 libpq 的引用处理行为，使长度受限的字符串能被正确处理。
- 此版本还修复了 pg_createsubscriber 内存泄漏以及 Meson 构建系统的头文件检测问题。
releaseNotes.ja_JP:
- PostgreSQL 17.4 は CVE-2025-1094 後の libpq のクォート処理を修正し、長さ制限付き文字列が正しく扱われるようにします。
- このリリースでは、pg_createsubscriber のメモリリークと Meson ビルドシステムのヘッダー検出問題も修正されています。
releaseNotes.ko_KR:
- PostgreSQL 17.4는 CVE-2025-1094 이후 libpq의 quoting 동작을 수정하여 길이가 제한된 문자열이 올바르게 처리되도록 합니다.
- 이 릴리스는 pg_createsubscriber 메모리 누수와 Meson 빌드 시스템의 헤더 감지 문제도 수정합니다.
releaseNotes.fr_FR:
- PostgreSQL 17.4 corrige le comportement de citation de libpq apres CVE-2025-1094 afin que les chaines limitees en longueur soient traitees correctement.
- Cette version corrige aussi une fuite memoire dans pg_createsubscriber et un probleme de detection d'en-tetes dans le systeme de build Meson.
releaseNotes.de_DE:
- PostgreSQL 17.4 behebt das libpq-Quoting-Verhalten nach CVE-2025-1094, sodass laengenbegrenzte Zeichenketten korrekt verarbeitet werden.
- Diese Version behebt ausserdem ein Speicherleck in pg_createsubscriber und ein Problem bei der Header-Erkennung im Meson-Buildsystem.
releaseNotes.sv_SE:
- PostgreSQL 17.4 fixar libpq-citatbeteende efter CVE-2025-1094 så att length-limited-strängar hanteras korrekt.
- Utgåvan åtgärdar också en minnesläcka pg_createsubscriber och ett Meson build-system header-detekteringsproblem.
releaseNotes.el_GR:
- Το PostgreSQL 17.4 διορθώνει τη συμπεριφορά εισαγωγικών libpq μετά από CVE-2025-1094, ώστε οι συμβολοσειρές length-limited να χειρίζονται σωστά.
- Η έκδοση διορθώνει επίσης μια διαρροή μνήμης pg_createsubscriber και ένα πρόβλημα ανίχνευσης κεφαλίδας Meson build-system.
releaseNotes.hr_HR:
- PostgreSQL 17.4 popravlja ponašanje libpq citiranja nakon CVE-2025-1094 tako da se s nizovima length-limited rukuje ispravno.
- Izdanje također popravlja curenje memorije pg_createsubscriber i problem otkrivanja zaglavlja Meson build-system.
releaseNotes.pt_PT:
- PostgreSQL 17.4 corrige o comportamento de citação da libpq após CVE-2025-1094 para que as strings length-limited sejam tratadas corretamente.
- A versão também corrige uma fuga de memória pg_createsubscriber e um problema de deteção de cabeçalho Meson build-system.
releaseNotes.ru_RU:
- PostgreSQL 17.4 исправляет поведение цитирования libpq после CVE-2025-1094, поэтому строки length-limited обрабатываются правильно.
- В выпуске также исправлена ​​утечка памяти pg_createsubscriber и проблема обнаружения заголовка Meson build-system.
releaseNotes.tr_TR:
- PostgreSQL 17.4, CVE-2025-1094 sonrasındaki libpq alıntı yapma davranışını düzelterek length-limited dizelerinin doğru şekilde işlenmesini sağlar.
- Sürüm ayrıca pg_createsubscriber bellek sızıntısını ve Meson build-system başlık algılama sorununu da düzeltir.

title: PostgreSQL
